prevalence.source: Newborn screening program reports; endocrine epidemiology
prevalence.trend: stable; detection improves with screening expansion

burden.dalyPerCapita: low with early treatment; high disability without treatment

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated TSH/low T4 on newborn screening; confirmatory serum testing

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Screening coverage uneven; confirmatory testing in referral labs
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Early levothyroxine replacement with regular monitoring
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Screening gaps and delayed follow-up in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Effective therapy and growing newborn screening coverage
